display.purpose: Hero titles and massive display headings only.

title.purpose: Card headings and menu item titles.

label.purpose: Uppercase metadata tags and form labels.

components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #9E2F2F; color: #FFFFFF; font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700; border: none; padding: 12px 28px; border-radius: 50px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #A55325; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: transparent; color: #B58E4F; font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700; border: 1px solid #B58E4F; padding: 12px 28px; border-radius: 50px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #B58E4F; color: #FDFBF7; }

narrative.overview: Pepeton's website uses a premium, deeply atmospheric dark theme that transports visitors straight into the sensory experience of a traditional Filipino grillhouse. The design rejects the cold, sterile, white-backed templates of modern web design in favor of visual warmth, smoky textures, and heritage typography.
keyCharacteristics: Committed Dark Palette mirroring the charred wood, roasted meats, and embers of the grill.
Bold Serif Presence through high-contrast headings that carry the weight of a heritage family brand.
Visual Food-First Layouts featuring photography set against dark, textured backdrops.
Warm Accents of gold, warm orange, and rich crimson to guide attention, action, and flavor cues.

rules.name: The Golden Ember Rule
rules.body: Red and Gold combined must cover less than 15% of any page surface. They are signaling devices for flavor, brand, and actions; overusing them dilutes their premium impact.

rules.name: The No-Caps Prose Rule
rules.body: Never write paragraph sentences or subheadings in all-caps. Capitalization is reserved exclusively for labels, prices, or short navigation tags of four words or less.

dos: Do use high-quality, saturated photographs of Filipino food with dark/smoky lighting to match the Ember canvas.
Do check contrast on text: Body Cream text on Maroon Background has a contrast ratio of >7:1.
Do structure menus as reflowing lists that collapse to single-column cards on screens under 768px.
Do feature the official logo cropped-logo.png prominently in the navigation header and footer.
donts: Don't use Playfair Display or Inter fonts.
Don't use standard white, gray, or cool slate backgrounds.
Don't use side-stripe borders as card accents. Use full borders (1px solid #5C2A10) or nothing.
Don't use gradient text or decorative glassmorphism.
